title: One-Round Hogan
writer: F.L. Griffen, Charles R. Condon, George Godfrey
actors: Monte Blue, Leila Hyams, James J. Jeffries
plot: "One-Round' Hogan is a heavyweight prizefighter with a knockout punch contending for a championship bout who, because of the death of a friend, almost wrecks his own career by holding back.
